The '''Yatir''' were a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]], [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. They were native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Absit]],<ref name="ISB2" /> located in the south-western portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Yatir were sympathetic to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] became aware of that sympathy and tried to suppress the humanoids, initially without full success. Ultimately, the [[Imperial Hammers Elite Armor Unit/Legends|Hell's Hammers]], under the command of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Zel Johans|"Rancor" Johans]], traveled to Absit and finally [[Subjugation of the Yatir|subjugated]] the Yatir. Shortly after that battle, Johans was promoted to [[High Colonel/Legends|High Colonel]].<ref name="Journal">{{JournalCite|15|Special Military Unit Intelligence Update}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[Greg Gorden]] created the Yatir for the ''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]'', which was published in [[1989]] as a supplement to the [[West End Games]]' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|roleplaying game]].<ref name="ISB">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''</ref>
